buildCommand: cd portal && npm ci && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.groq.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:
